data.name: FEMBOY SLEEPOVER - Episode 2
data.detailed_description:
Halloween is right around the corner! This month, the demon you sold your soul to gave you a very specific request... Will you give her what she wants, or will you finally find a way to banish her back to hell?!

Thankfully, you don't have to make that choice alone. Your femboy roommates are there to help you every step of the way.

They even invited some new friends. An odd couple who have no idea what they're in for... Will their sacrifice be in vain?

Find out in Episode 2 of this cute gay Visual Novel!

FEATURES

  • Bond with Femboys ~ Make choices that impact your relationship with three cute femboys.

  • Branching Narrative ~ Alter the path of the story.

  • Demonic Rituals?! ~ Good luck putting that one back in the box...

data.short_description: You've been invited to the Femboy Sleepover! In episode 2 of this cute yaoi visual novel series, look for ways to exorcise the demon you summoned.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
